ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "urls" TEXT /* URLs included in the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites (likes) */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "tweet_type" TEXT /* Type of tweet (e.g., original, retweet, quote) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is a member of */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favourite tweets */,
  "statuses_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets posted by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url_text" TEXT /* Text of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_urls" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "follower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friends" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user befriended the friend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "friend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_statuses" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_likes" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the tweet */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user liked the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_retweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted the tweet */,
  "retweeted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user retweeted the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_replies" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being replied to */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply tweet */,
  "replied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_mentions" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mentioned user */,
  "mentioned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id", "mentioned_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tweets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tweet was added to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
